Define initial ordering (option order)

Source: R/dt2_options.R
dt2_order.Rd

Define initial ordering (option order)

Usage

dt2_order(options = list(), ...)

Arguments

options

Options list.

...

Vectors like c(col, "asc"/"desc"). col may be name or 1-based index.

Value

Updated options.

Examples

opts <- list(columns = names(mtcars))
opts <- dt2_order(opts, c("mpg", "desc"))
dt2(mtcars, options = opts)

On this page

DT2 is part of an ecosystem of R packages for data analysis and computational document processing
developed at the Secretaria Executiva de Monitoramento Estratégico.

Developed by André Leite, Marcos Wasilew, Hugo Vasconcelos, Carlos Amorin and Diogo Bezerra
